headline: Dow Jones Futures: SpaceX IPO To Launch After Trump Spurs Market Rally
summary: Dow Jones futures: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq jumped as Trump canceled Iran strikes, but still below key levels. The SpaceX IPO priced at 135 a share. CrowdStrike flashed a new buy signal.

content.summary: Dow Jones futures: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq jumped as Trump canceled Iran strikes, but still below key levels. The SpaceX IPO priced at 135 a share. CrowdStrike flashed a new buy signal.

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Climb On Hot Inflation And Fed Jitters
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Jun, 12 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 futures up about 0.8% and Nasdaq-100 minis gaining around 1.2%, as investors weigh hotter US inflation against still solid rate expectations. May consumer prices rose 0.5% month on month, pushing headline inflation to 4.2% and energy costs up 23.5% over the year, which means pricier gasoline and heating for households. At the same time, the 10 year Treasury...

headline: Software stocks tumble in sympathy as fragile market sentiment fractures again
summary: Investing.com -- The broader software complex experienced widespread declines on Friday as fragile investor confidence gave way to a wave of sympathetic selling across the sector. The turn lower continued to arrest a month-long recovery fueled in part by strong corporate results and forward guidance from Snowflake. headline: In 5 Months, Big Tech Has Borrowed More Than In the Last 5 Years
summary: Artificial intelligence is reshaping nearly every corner of the technology industry, but it is also transforming corporate finance. Companies are no longer just competing for customers or market share. They are competing for computing power, data centers, semiconductors, and energy infrastructure. headline: The Biggest Warning Signal Flashing for Oracle Right Now Has Nothing to Do With Sales or Profitability
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) recently reported blockbuster earnings, with both the top and bottom lines coming in above estimates.
